message:
fix(fwc): clippy lint fixes and strengthen MCP serve test assertions

- doctor.rs: use array literal instead of vec! for non-growing collection,
  add #[allow(clippy::redundant_clone)] on intentional clone coverage test
- new_cmd.rs: remove unnecessary .clone() on Copy type in archetype test
- serve_mcp.rs: add !is_error() assertions to all MCP response tests,
  add count assertions for resources (5), prompts (4), and messages (2),
  verify all operations belong to the correct connector_id, assert
  specific operation_id and rate-limits/history resource URIs
- tokio_exception_ledger.json: fix trailing comma in JSON array

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
